titleStmt.title: SII 18.268: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 268. CHAUḌADĀNPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in Muktēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Rāmachandradēva, is dated in his regnal year 24, Khara, Pushya ba. Amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1292, January, 21. The week-day, however, was Monday and not Sunday as cited in the record, though amāvāsyā commenced on Sunday after ·11.

It records that, at the instance of Mahāpradhāna Sarvādhikāri Paraśurāmadēva, Sarvādhikāri Dēvarasa, Sitāḷa-Hegaḍe and others made a grant of tolls to god Muktanātha of Gōpe, which is described as Dakshiṇavāraṇāśi. Siddha-Śivadēva of Gōpe is described as the Rāya-Rājaguru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ . sivāyaḥ . srīsivadēvaprabhu
vē saraṇuḥ . svasti śrīmatu yādavarāya
nārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpa
cakravartti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdradēva vijayarā
jyōdayada 24 neya kharasaṁvatsada pu
sya bahuḷa Amavase Ādivara yarddhōda
yada sūryyagrahaṇadali svasti śrīmatu rā
yarājaguru mahāvīrabrati nūṟeṁṭu
navabrataniṣṭaraha gōpeya siddhasivadēvara praṇa
liṁga muktēsvaradēvara tuṁgabhadre paścimavā
hini dakṣiṇavāraṇāsiya gōpeya nā
nūṟippattibara ṣaṁnidhiyalli yā muktanā
thadēvarige . svasti śrīmanumāhāpradhānaṁ sa
rvvādhikāri parasurāmadēvara nirūpadiṁ sa
rbbādhikāri habbarasara dēvarasaru suṁkada
sitāḷahegaḍe Ā muktanāthadēvara purada
staḷa suṁka kāruka telligaru maggadeṟe Āṁgaḍi
mukhyavāgi Aṣṭabhōga tēja sāṁmya 25 E
ttina suṁka meyideṟe mūlesuṁkavanu
sarbbamāṁnyavanu Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi si
reya mudre sahita dhārāpū
rvvakavāgi koṭṭanu . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvaruṣasahaśrā
ṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
mi . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
śrī muktanātha saraṇu .
Digital edition of SII 18.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
